title: elionurus citreus
intro: Elionurus citreus, also known as Lemon-grass or Lemon-scented Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elionurus citreus include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Elionurus citreus is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
